title: チコちゃんに叱られる！▽七夕の願い事▽高校野球の謎▽ガスコンロの不思議 2024年07月05日
description:
チコちゃんに叱られる！▽七夕の願い事▽高校野球の謎▽ガスコンロの不思議
[総合] 
2024年07月05日 午後7:57 〜 午後8:42 (45分)
今回のチコちゃんの素朴な疑問は…なぜ七夕の日に願い事をする？なぜ高校野球の応援曲は懐メロが多い？なぜガスコンロの炎は青い？みなさん答えられますか？

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/MB0HScH.png "チコちゃんに叱られる！▽七夕の願い事▽高校野球の謎▽ガスコンロの不思議")

	なぜ七夕の日に願い事をする？…はるか昔に生まれたあの国の物語がなぜか日本ではこんな事態に！？なぜ高校野球の応援曲は懐メロが多い？…甲子園を盛り上げてきた誰でも知っている応援の名曲が続々登場！なぜガスコンロの炎は青い？…たき火やロウソクの炎は青くないのにガスコンロはなぜ！？デリバリー頼りをやめられないお悩みにどうこたえる？キョエちゃんの怪談話コーナー！ゲストは河合優実さんと小森隼さん！

___

# THE IMAGINARY (Yaneura no Rudger)




***

Remux perso :

Video : 

[Trix] Yaneura no Rudger (2023) (BD 2160p 4K HDR AV1) | The Imaginary 屋根裏のラジャー
https://nyaa.si/view/1821642

[Merci à TriX pour la qualité de son enco AV1].

Audio : 

[Anime Land] Yaneura no Rudger (BDRip 1080p HEVC HDR10 EAC3 Atmos) [FEE73A39].mkv
https://nyaa.si/view/1824733

SUB FR:

The Imaginary 2024 1080p NF WEB-DL DDP5.1 Atmos H 264-VARYG (Yaneura no Rudger, Dual-Audio, Multi-Subs)
https://nyaa.si/view/1841494



___

Amanda est une petite fille pleine d'esprit qui est amie avec un petit garçon tout droit sorti de son imaginaire, Rudger, qu'elle seule est capable de voir. 
Hélas, son existence chimérique est menacée : le garçon est traqué par un certain M. Bunting, chasseur et mangeur d'amis imaginaires...
.
Yaneura no Rudger est une adaptation du roman The Imaginary de A.F. Harrold et Emily Gravett.
Troisième long métrage du studio japonais Studio Ponoc (Mary and the Witch's Flower), The Imaginary est une fantaisie séduisante, bien que légèrement alambiquée, sur un ami imaginaire appelé Rudger, qui se retrouve séparé d'Amanda, la petite fille qui l'a inventé. 

Avec son animation exquise dessinée à la main et son côté étrange, The Imaginary a plus en commun avec la production du Studio Ghibli - ce qui n'est peut-être pas surprenant, puisque le réalisateur, Yoshiyuki Momose, a été le principal animateur de Spirited Away et d'autres titres classiques de Ghibli.

| Info     |                                                  |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| Author   | Gosha                                            |
| Artist   | Solem                                            |
| Genres   | Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Psychological |
| Type     | Manhwa                                           |
| Year     | 2020                                             |
| Chapters | 1-149                                            |
**Synopsis**:
Myeongok is just your typical 49-year-old mother living her life with her family--at least, that’s what she’d want you to believe. When two people from another world suddenly show up and ask her to help save their world, she refuses. She has a family now and can’t risk putting her life on hold... but will she be able to say no if her daughter is involved? Will Myeongok be able to find some way to save this other world and protect what’s dearest to her as well?

title: [VCB-Studio] 真·中华一番！ / Shin Chuuka Ichiban! / 真・中華一番! 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Fin]
description:
![shin_chuuka_ichiban_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/06/30/shin_chuuka_ichiban_800.webp)  
  
真·中华一番！ / Shin Chuuka Ichiban! / 真・中華一番! BDRip  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
本片是2019年制作放送的中华小当家新动画，不是上世纪末的童年回忆，想怀古的观众可能要失望了。  
原盘画质较差，主要问题是过量噪点经过编码后引起的欠码。线条有比较严重的蚊噪，另外还有一定程度的振铃和较强的锯齿。平面因为噪点的关系没什么色带，取而代之的是色块和烂噪。我们使用了比较激进的降噪手段并重构了噪点层，以改善欠码造成的观感问题。剩下就是一些常规处理：去色带、抗锯齿、去振铃、补偿性锐化。  
This is the new animation "Shin Chuuka Ichiban!" produced and aired in 2019, not the childhood memory from the late 90s, so you might be disappointed if you are looking for a nostalgic trip.  
The image quality of the BD source is poor, mainly due to insufficient bitrate caused by excessive noise after encoding. The lines suffer from severe DCT noise, and there is also a significant amount of ringing and aliasing. The flat areas are free of banding due to the noise, but instead exhibit blocking and badly encoded grain. We employed aggressive denoising and reconstructed the grain layer to mitigate the visual issues caused by insufficient bitrate. The rest are standard processings: de-banding, anti-aliasing, de-ringing, and compensatory sharpening.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
总监 / Script: 刘昴星  
压制 / Encode: 周梅丽  
整理 / Collate: 几木刀  
发布 / Upload: 时苍s  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
CDs: {ikouraiba, applevoice}@jpopsuki, arition@U2

title: [SubsPlus+] Oshi no Ko - S02E01v3 (DSNP WEB 1080p AVC EAC3)
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Disney+ (AVC) via Anonymous    |
| Audio     | Amazon Prime (EAC3) via Tsundere-Raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> Disney+ and Amazon Prime are on a 1 day delay. The audio sync is fine between the two, seems like Hidive just got a different master than the rest. These should be the best web sources for this show, correct me if I'm wrong.
> 
> I'm not sure if I will keep doing this for upcoming episodes.

title: [lost108 - Kaerizaki-Fansub] BLEACH - 110-212 - VOSTFR - 1080p - x265 - JAP BDRIP
description:
Salut à tous.

Vous attendiez la suite, la voici !

La recette est inchangée, sous-titres ADN retravaillés, et effets sur les sous-titres, comme à la belle époque !

Voici le détail de ce deuxième pack.

   *  La vidéo et l’audio proviennent de KoushinRip
    Elle a été encodée en x265, preset slower, CRF-16 et 18 pour les 1080p, tune -grain et quelques autres joyeusetés.
    Toujours en 59.940 fps (bwdif=1), avec plus de fluidité dans les travelings, et surtout dans les OP et ED
Oui c'est gros, mais voyez ça aussi comme de l'archivage, la version Light arrive juste derrière...
    
    * L’audio est d’origine, en DTS-HD Master Audio, il n’a pas été retravaillé.
      Il n’y a pas de piste française.

    * Le chapitrage est complet : Opening, Partie 1, Eye Catch, Partie 2, Ending, Preview.

Et pour les sous-titres, je suis toujours reparti de la version ADN, resynchronisée et modifiée.
Je l'ai également incluse.
Pas de version anglaise cette fois, mais j'ai utilisé les OP et ED de  ParanDark, synchronisée par UQW : https://nyaa.si/view/1619947 (thanks guys), du 110 au 167.
N'ayant pas de base et n'y connaissant rien en kara, j'ai effectué une synchro et une nouvelle traduction des OP et ED suivants.

Pour la suite, ce sont ceux de Flomp qui m'ont servi de base anglaise.

Je remercie infiniment hashirama-senpai de Kaerizaki-Fansub qui m’a fait gagner un temps fou sur les encodages.

Je partage également tous les sous-titres, polices et chapitres.
Utilisez-les à votre convenance.

Comme toujours, je compte sur vous pour des retours concernant de (très) possibles erreurs.

Oh ! Et pour les personnages bizarres au design improbable, ce sont des Bounts, persos d'un arc filler qui a voulu s'étirer un peu trop... n'y faites donc pas attention, ils ne resteront pas longtemps !

Et pour le 3e pack... disons que j'espère mettre moins d'un an pour y arriver !

À la prochaine.

-EDIT-

Version Light disponible ici : https://nyaa.si/view/1841830

**Описание:**
Сильнейший маг армии Короля Демонов — так называют Айка, способного в одиночку захватить замок. Уничтожая противников с помощью могущественной магии, он, без сомнения, самый настоящий монстр, вызывающий уважение у друзей и вселяющий ужас во врагов. Однако у сильнейшего мага есть секрет, который он не может рассказать другим демонам: на самом деле он человек.

title: [SubsPlus+] I Parry Everything - S01E01 (AMZN WEB 1080p AVC EAC3) | Ore wa Subete wo Parry Suru
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | None  |



---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

title: [Dalte] Knight Under My Heart (2022) (Digital) (LINE Webtoon)
description:
[mangaupdates](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series/q4vsqy0), [LINE Webtoon](https://www.webtoons.com/en/action/knight-under-my-heart/list?title_no=4215).
| Info     |                                                |
| -------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Authors  | RASNE, Routine. J                              |
| Artist   | HAN Sungwoo (STUDIO GRIFFIN)                   |
| Genres   | Action, Drama, Fantasy, Mature, Sci-fi, Seinen |
| Type     | Manhwa                                         |
| Year     | 2022                                           |
| Chapters | 0-40                                           |
**Synopsis**:
Have you ever skipped studying to play video games? Unfortunately for high school senior Yushin Lee, the stakes are a little higher than flunking, as he finds himself trapped in a VR-based MMORPG. Yushin was selected to beta test the game, only to be forced to fight for his life in a seemingly endless loop. What was supposed to be a light distraction from the stress of high-school life becomes a desperate struggle for survival as Yushin battles his way through REAL Online, a dark fantasy world created by a mysterious tech company with uncertain motives. Lee Yooshin went to try out a new virtual reality game. However, it wasn't just a game. It has a 100% assimilation rate! A game world where everything feels eerily real- In the endless cycle of death and resurrection where logging out is not allowed, Yooshin prepares to fight. In order to escape the hellish battlefield from which there's no escape...

**Notes**:
Reuploading with properly ripped chapters.

**Synopsis**:
Gang-An’s dream of designing the best sneaker in the world is snuffed out when her sneaker customization team, Tria, loses the Custom Kicks Championship. She tells herself that she has given up on her dream for good and tries to carry on with her life when she comes across a shocking truth. OnGrey, the second-largest sneaker brand in the world, has stolen her design from the Championship! Will Gang-An be able to return to designing despite her fears and succeed in her fight against OnGrey to reclaim what is rightfully hers?

title: [Weeaboo-Shogun] Shinkalion Change the World 13
description:
WEEABOO SHOGUN PRESENTS
Shinkalion: Change the World
Episode 13
"A Cool Person"

Taisei struggles to come to grips with the knowledge that his sister is the driver of the Phantom Shinkalion. Ina threatens to attack ERDA directly, while Ryota and Akane rush back to Omiya to reinforce the base. Commander Hama makes it clear that Ina is to be attacked with full intensity and that human lives are at stake. When Taisei's suitability value returns to operational status, Hama unlocks the most fearsome weapon in the E5 Hayabusa's arsenal: the legendary Gran Cross. Will even that be enough to stop the Phantom Shinkalion?

Chihiro is recruiting quality controllers, timers and typesetters and is willing to train. Visit their Discord linked below or contact them via #Chihiro@irc.rizon.net.

Thank you for choosing our releases! I hope you enjoyed watching the show! I’ll make a season batch after Chihiro make theirs, as various changes, fixes and improvements will be made to the subs.

**Translation:** Len (Checking), Soichiro (Songs)
**Timing:** nvenc
**Typesetting:** itsP
**Editing:** charon
**Quality Control:** akuma
**Karaoke Effects:** Kristen

Discord: [Chihiro](https://discord.gg/ZRNDEPr), [LostYears](https://discord.gg/F43jMEjzwR)

That's it from me for the Spring 2024 season, I'm glad to have brought bring Madome and KonoSuba to your screens in these past few months.
This season I'm interested in releasing the following shows, given the right conditions are met:
- [Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian](https://anilist.co/anime/162804/Alya-Sometimes-Hides-Her-Feelings-in-Russian/) (english dub - confirmed, fansub - likely)
- [Makeine: Too Many Losing Heroines!](https://anilist.co/anime/171457/Makeine-Too-Many-Losing-Heroines/) (english dub - confirmed)

My cogroupers or ZeroBuild are likely to work on the following shows:
- [Tower of God Season 2](https://anilist.co/anime/153406/Tower-of-God-Season-2/)
- [NieR:Automata Ver1.1a Cour 2](https://anilist.co/anime/167420/NieRAutomata-Ver11a-2nd-Season)

We'll of course be continuing these shows into the current season:
- [Spice and Wolf (2024)](https://nyaa.si/user/LostYears?q=Spice)
- [The Dangers in My Heart Season 2](https://nyaa.si/user/LostYears?q=Dangers)

_Nothing_ from the upcoming projects is set in stone yet, so no promises!

description:
![](https://i.lensdump.com/i/6BKULK.png)
*Come hang out in **[Discord](https://discord.gg/47Q7FdB54e)***

#### **[The Vexations of a Shut-In Vampire Princess [Season 1]](https://myanimelist.net/anime/54103/Hikikomari_Kyuuketsuki_no_Monmon)**

---

**Synopsis**
In a world where death is not permanent, Terakomari "Komari" Gandesblood has been a self-proclaimed professional shut-in for the past three years. As part of the noble Gandesblood lineage, she once tried to meet the expectations of her family. However, as a vampire who cannot use magic or consume blood, she soon gave up on becoming an imperial general like her ancestors. Unfortunately, a misunderstanding with her father earns her the formidable position of one of the Seven Crimson Lords, the strongest fighters and generals in the Mulnite Empire.

Now, Komari must hide her lack of talent from the soldiers she commands, or they may attempt to overthrow her. Working alongside her newly-assigned maid, Villhaze, Komari manages to trick her unit of soldiers into believing she is a ruthless warlord and promises to conquer the world. But as more people come to admire Komari, her life is further threatened as a vampire from her past reappears with every intention to kill her for good.

![](https://c.l3n.co/i/zfTLbv.png)

---

**Language Options**
I included two simple scripts that you can apply to these files to do the following (Windows only):

1. Make [Single Audio] Japanese: Throws out *English audio* and *Signs&Songs subtitles* tracks
2. Make [Single Audio] English: Throws out *Japanese audio* and *Dialogue subtitles* tracks
	
To apply these put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the .bat file. 
*Don't combine them and only use them once together with the base files.*

---

**Source**
🗃️ Video and JPN Audio (JPN BDMV): **[[Lupin the Nerd]](https://nyaa.si/view/1810766)**
🗃️ ENG Audio (WEB): **[[NanDesuKa]](https://nyaa.si/view/1804655)**
🗃️ Subtitles: **[[Chihiro]](https://nyaa.si/view/1825083)**
💬 *Subtitles Info: [Chihiro]*

*Thank you all for making this possible <3*

---

title: [SubsPlus+] Oshi no Ko - S02E01v2 (NF WEB 1080p AVC AAC)
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Netflix (AVC) via NanDesuKa    |
| Audio     | Netflix (AAC) via NanDesuKa    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | via NanDesuKa  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> V1 had an audio sync issue. No Amazon audio since the mid episode pause is a different length in Netflix and Amazon Hidive Channel so the audio gets out of sync in the second half.
> 
> MTBB will not be doing this season of Oshi no Ko. Consider waiting for Starsugen if you can. Otherwise, enjoy the show!

title: [SubsPlus+] Oshi no Ko - S02E01 (NF WEB 1080p AVC EAC3)
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Netflix (AVC) via NanDesuKa    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | via NanDesuKa  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> MTBB will not be doing this season of Oshi no Ko. Consider waiting for Starsugen if you can. Otherwise, enjoy the show!

title: [千夏字幕组&喵萌奶茶屋&VCB-Studio] 街角魔族 / Machikado Mazoku / まちカドまぞく 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [S1 Reseed v2 Fin]
description:
![103163053_p0_res.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/06/03/103163053_p0_res.webp)  
  
街角魔族 / Machikado Mazoku / まちカドまぞく BDRip Reseed v2  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
这个项目与 **千夏字幕组** 和 **喵萌奶茶屋** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Airota** & **Nekomoe kissaten**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
原盘的画面是典型的 ppt 型节操社省钱画风。在低复杂度的画面下还是观察到了平面欠码现象，并且伴有噪点掩盖的色带，对此进行了针对性的修复。好消息是原盘的有效分辨率非常的高，线条干净锐利，这里仅做了些微的线条锐化以补偿修复带来的副作用。由于画面较为简单，我们得以控制在约 600MB 一集的体积的同时保证令人满意的观感。  
The series has medium image quality with cost-saving J.C.Staff style. The color banding and slightly blocking artifact we found were treated carefully to preserve sharpness. Due to the low complex image style, we were able to maintain visual quality and push the bit rate lower.  
  
整理：光速滑跪Orz  
  

* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 修正了 Vol.4 的扫图。  
2\. 删除了 EP9 中错误的评论轨。  
  
Reseed comment:  
1\. Fixed the scan of Vol.4.  
2\. Removed the wrong commentary track in EP9.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
整理 / Collate: PuddingCafe  
发布 / Upload: Shadow Mistress Yuko  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
Scans: 姫坂乃愛@U2  
  

* * *

本次发布来自 VCB-Studio 旧作重发计划。我们会不定期重发过去发布过的合集，或为补充做种，或为修正制作错漏，或为整合系列合集。  
This is a release of VCB-Studio Reseed Project. We would re-upload previous torrents from time to time, to resurrect old torrents with few seeders, to correct errors/omissions, or to batch separate releases that belong to a same series.

**Synopsis**:
College student Soshin Kang has made a deal with the devil. When poverty and violent loan sharks force Soshin to take up an offer from Aram, Soshin’s high school friend-turned-bully, to live in Aram’s lavish house with all expenses paid, it seems like a dream come true. Although Aram appears sweet and gentle, in reality she is a cold, manipulative stalker who is obsessed with Soshin and will stop at nothing to keep her to herself. As people around her begin to get hurt, Soshin finds herself in a race against time to uncover the truth and escape Aram’s grasp.

## What is this?

Hello again from your friends at </redacted/>!                                                                                                       
With [Phrenapates] out of commission, anon found himself with no choice but to take matters into his own hands.                                   
                                                                           
We got to talking about the show tonight and decided to do a release using Erai-raws video/audio for the sake of timing simplicity. If you already got this script from a certain somewhere, this upload contains several timing fixes and minor translation alterations. Thanks to the effort of multiple anons, we prepared a new release, QCed it, and got it posted to nyaa. Thanks goes out to everyone involved!                     
                                                                           
We hope someone here will find it useful and enjoys it. If enough people are interested we might do a batch release in the near future. Which would include our own encodes (likely from BD) instead of using someone else's. We don't usually use other people's encodes. But in the interest of speed and the fact that no better source exists at the moment we didn't see the point and delaying this for several more hours (or days knowing our IRL schedules).                                                                 

## Sources used:

- Video: Video: Erai-raws (x264)
- Audio: Erai-raws (AAC)

title: [Team ONIBE] Love Live! Nijigasaki High School Idol Club 2nd Live Brand New Story + Back to the TOKIMEKI
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/wdd9JAY.png"")


We're proud to present Nijigasaki High School Idol Club's 2nd Live! Just as Love Live Fest was a concert of many firsts for the series as a whole, this is a concert of many firsts for Niji. It celebrates the one-year anniversary of School Idol Festival All Stars, and is the first of their performances to be held at the then-newly-built Tokyo Garden Theater in Odaiba. It's also their first concert under restrictions due to COVID-19, having been exclusively streamed online with no live audience. Perhaps more importantly, this is both the last concert before the airing of the anime and the first concert to officially feature Koizumi Moeka/Mifune Shioriko as part of the club!

Day one is titled "Brand New Story" and features performances of songs from their third album, unit singles, and more! Day two is titled "Back to the Tokimeki" and primarily features the first album songs as a way of looking back on what they had accomplished thus far. Of course, we've also subbed the included "Making of" video.



We hope you enjoy watching this important turning point in Niji's history!


This is a non-profit fan translation. If you enjoyed it, please support Love Live! and Nijigasaki by buying the official Blu-ray if possible.




#### **Main Credits**

MC Translation: Yahallo, Jolt
Song Translation: dasaher, Yahallo, Dyrea
Timing: Yahallo, Jolt, BoonBoon
Karaoke Timing: dasaher, Dyrea
Typeset: Yujacha, AirCookiee, Dantalian, Mizoe
Karaoke Timing App: gacha4life
Karaoke Effects: Dyrea, Yujacha
Translation Check: xIceArcher, Dyrea
QC: Jolt, Yujacha, PokéFanOne
Source/Encode: link2110




#### **FAQ**

**Can I have your permission to use your subtitle files to re-translate into another language?**
Absolutely! Just make sure to give credit where appropriate.

**I see a bunch of weird video/subtitle issues.**
Use the newest version of MPV.

**Will there be a 720p version?**
No.

**What took you so long?**
~~Because we’re regular people with full-time jobs and/or school (except Dyrea who was eventing in Japan every other week), and dear lord typesetting was a nightmare~~ Because you didn’t help us!

title: [BDMV] My Daughter Left the Nest and Returned an S-Rank Adventurer
description:
The young adventurer Belgrieve retires to a quieter life after losing his leg to a beast. While gathering herbs in the woods one day, he rescues an abandoned child. Angeline trains with her father and later achieves S-Rank in the capital’s adventurer guild. Five years later, she decides to return home. Will Belgrieve get another chance at being an adventurer? Will Angeline return home unscathed?

Clean Credits are on the bonus disc.

Since the program was using for some series no longer works going to probably re-rip a few series needed to finish with a different program.
Chained Soldier
KanColle: See You Again on Another Quiet Blue Sea
Solo Leveling

**Описание:**
Тринадцать лет назад над Землёй возник гигантский летающий замок, из которого начали раз в неделю появляться разнообразные монстры, пытающиеся захватить мир. И каждый раз их злодейские планы останавливали Хранители-Драконы — пять могучих героев, охраняющих планету от вечной угрозы.
Но что если это всё обман? Что если настоящие завоеватели давно побеждены? А роль монстров играют пусть и бессмертные, но бессильные бойцы-статисты, чтобы поддерживать влияние Хранителей? И что если одному из бойцов это всё в конец осточертело, и он хочет нарушить статус-кво?
